context_text:
SMILE INDEX: 51
WINDOW: 750.967s to 787.700s (smile at 770.967s to 772.700s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[722.850-1086.150] interviewee: differed. We had meetings about history. And we had like, for instance, I became in charge of the Keren Kayemet, of the national fund-- Israel National Fund. And I was elected to the Zionist organization as a delegate to the congress. And those were my activities. In the summer, we arranged summer camps. First, I arranged the summer camp for our state only.

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
organization as a delegate
